urgent.action: Replace all public-facing mentions of 'Feb 25, 2026' with 'Early March 2026' in metadata, manifest, localized message bundles, and landing-page CTA copy before next deploy.
urgent.reasoning: Date mismatch creates trust risk and can hurt CTR from branded queries. Search snippets and social previews may continue showing the wrong date if metadata is not corrected immediately.

urgent.action: Update homepage/en meta title + description to include high-intent local terms ('donuts near me in Waikiki', 'coffee near me Waikiki') and opening timing, then request reindex in GSC.
urgent.reasoning: CTR is ~1.1% despite average position 7.2 and 2,603 impressions. Better SERP copy can lift clicks without ranking changes.

quickWins.action: Rewrite meta description to include clear USP + location + opening window + CTA in 140-155 chars.
quickWins.reasoning: Query is already around position 9.4 with 20 impressions and 0 clicks; snippet improvements can quickly increase click share.

quickWins.action: Align title/description on /ko, /ja, /es pages with local-language intent and include Waikiki + Kona Coffee modifiers.
quickWins.reasoning: Non-English pages show impressions (e.g., /ko/about-kona-coffee at 40 impressions) but no clicks, indicating snippet/message mismatch.

quickWins.action: Add/expand FAQ schema for opening date, hours, parking, and location landmarks to improve rich result eligibility.
quickWins.reasoning: Current signals indicate informational/local intent; richer SERP features can improve CTR for near-me queries in positions 5-16.

opportunities.action: Prioritize mobile landing UX and map/call CTAs; mobile has materially better CTR than desktop and should be primary conversion surface.
opportunities.reasoning: Mobile CTR (~3.1%) far exceeds desktop (~0.1%), suggesting desktop snippet relevance or SERP intent mismatch while mobile demand is stronger.

opportunities.action: Strengthen Google Business Profile signals (opening update, categories, fresh photos, weekly posts, Q&A) and embed consistent NAP/hours across site pages.
opportunities.reasoning: Most demand is local-intent ('near me', Waikiki, donut/coffee terms). Local pack optimization can outperform organic blue links for discovery traffic.

opportunities.action: Publish short pages/posts around 'best breakfast in Waikiki', 'Kona coffee Waikiki', 'mochi donuts Waikiki' tied to early-March opening campaign.
opportunities.reasoning: Current keyword spread is broad but shallow; focused local content can capture mid-tail terms and support internal linking to core conversion pages.

insights.observation: Branded query 'kona coffee donut' ranks #1 with strong CTR, indicating solid brand match for navigational intent.
insights.suggestion: Preserve branded dominance while shifting optimization effort toward non-branded local-intent queries.

insights.observation: Several keywords in positions 4-10 have 0 clicks, signaling SERP copy and intent alignment issues.
insights.suggestion: Run weekly title/description tests for top impression pages and monitor CTR deltas in GSC.

insights.observation: Monitoring found 71 HTML errors and missing key security headers; while not all directly impact rankings, trust and crawl quality may degrade.
insights.suggestion: Schedule a technical cleanup sprint for markup validity and baseline security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy).
